title: Total Functions, Result Values, and Pattern Matching · Pipeline Brief: Total Functions
summary: Make a batch import explain every rejected record rather than aborting or returning ambiguous sentinels. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp total functions increment in a typed parse-validate-result pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define outputs for every admitted input or narrow the domain with an explicit validation boundary.
Reject decorators that hide material domain behavior or make dependencies untestable.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
